partnerDashboard.title: Welcome, {name}
partnerDashboard.description: Review pending decisions and only the protection summaries members consented to share.
partnerDashboard.errorBody: The partner workspace could not be loaded. Try again before reviewing requests.
partnerDashboard.actionBody: Open the areas that need your response as an accountability partner.
partnerDashboard.approvalBody: Review join and exit requests without exposing a member's private data.
partnerDashboard.contactBody: Respond to contact requests that members intentionally send to you.
partnerDashboard.protectionBody: Only aggregate status that members consented to share is shown.
partnerDashboard.privacyTitle: The privacy boundary remains in place
partnerDashboard.privacyBody: Partners cannot see a student's journal, mood, URLs, browsing history, or detailed daily activity.

recoveryDashboard.supportiveLine: See your seven-day rhythm, then choose one small step that feels manageable.
recoveryDashboard.privacyStatus: Protection active, browsing data stays on your device
recoveryDashboard.privacyStatusUnknown: Browsing data stays on your device
recoveryDashboard.summaryCheckInsBody: Days you recorded during the last seven days
recoveryDashboard.summaryLatestMoodEmpty: Complete a check-in to start seeing your rhythm
recoveryDashboard.summaryActiveDaysBody: Recovery activity in the last 7 days
recoveryDashboard.summaryProtectionHelpBody: Protection support during the last seven days
recoveryDashboard.summaryRhythmBody: Consecutive participation, not a perfection target
recoveryDashboard.summaryDataStateBody: Recovery data remains separate from browsing history
recoveryDashboard.summaryCheckInTodo: Take a moment to check in with yourself
recoveryDashboard.summaryMissionTodo: Complete it whenever you are ready
recoveryDashboard.checkInGateDescription: Record how you are today before continuing to the dashboard.
recoveryDashboard.checkInGateStorage: Daily check-ins are stored in your account. They can support partner monitoring after that feature is enabled with your permission.
recoveryDashboard.todayDescription: Follow what feels useful. You can stop and return at any time.
recoveryDashboard.intentionEmpty: Set a personal reason you want to protect during this process.
recoveryDashboard.intentionDialogDescription: Use your own words. Your intention is stored locally first; account sync is optional.
recoveryDashboard.intentionInputLabel: What would you like to protect or change?
recoveryDashboard.intentionPlaceholder: Example: I want to finish university with a calmer mind.
recoveryDashboard.checkInDescription: There is no right or wrong answer. Choose what is closest to how you feel.
recoveryDashboard.memoryOnlyWarning: Browser storage is unavailable. Private data will only last while this tab remains open.
recoveryDashboard.checkInIncomplete: Choose your mood and a response for the urge section first.
recoveryDashboard.checkInSaveError: Your check-in was not saved to your account. Check your connection and try again.
recoveryDashboard.missionDescription: EXP can be claimed after the system verifies the activity.
recoveryDashboard.missionError: The mission is not available yet.
recoveryDashboard.mission2: Record one mood and urge check-in
recoveryDashboard.skillEyebrow: A skill that fits right now
recoveryDashboard.skillPrivateReason: This suggestion only uses the choices in your check-in, not your browsing history.
recoveryDashboard.skillPauseSummary: Create a brief space before choosing your next step.
recoveryDashboard.skillPausePractice: Place your feet on the floor. Breathe in for four counts, hold for two, then breathe out for six. Repeat three times.
recoveryDashboard.skillGroundSummary: Shift attention to real things you can see and feel.
recoveryDashboard.skillGroundPractice: Name five things you see, four things you feel, three sounds, two scents, and one thing you appreciate.
recoveryDashboard.skillReachSummary: You do not have to move through a difficult moment alone when you need support.
recoveryDashboard.skillReachPractice: Choose one trusted person. Send a short message saying you need someone to talk to or a distraction for a few minutes.
recoveryDashboard.skillMoveSummary: Changing position and place can interrupt an automatic pattern.
recoveryDashboard.skillMovePractice: Stand up, drink some water, then walk slowly for two minutes in a safe space.
recoveryDashboard.skillFocusSummary: Choose one small task to give your attention a clear direction.
recoveryDashboard.skillFocusPractice: Write down one task you can finish in 15 minutes. Close unnecessary distractions, start a timer, and work only on that step.
recoveryDashboard.skillBudgetSummary: Bring financial decisions back to needs you choose for yourself.
recoveryDashboard.skillBudgetPractice: Choose one important expense for the next seven days, note a safe limit, then choose one small action to protect it.
recoveryDashboard.skillCreativeSummary: Use a light creative activity to redirect an automatic pattern.
recoveryDashboard.skillCreativePractice: Choose an activity such as drawing, writing, or playing music. Do it for 10 minutes without judging the result.
recoveryDashboard.skillAwaitingTitle: Complete a check-in for a relevant suggestion
recoveryDashboard.skillAwaitingBody: Recommendations are only created from the mood and urge you choose yourself.
recoveryDashboard.reasonStrongUrge: The urge you selected is fairly strong, so a quick and concrete exercise may be easier to start.
recoveryDashboard.reasonLowMood: The mood you selected feels heavy, so reconnecting with your surroundings may help.
recoveryDashboard.reasonCalm: You are feeling calm enough to practise a skill before a situation becomes harder.
recoveryDashboard.reasonDefault: This option fits the check-in you just completed and takes only a few minutes.
recoveryDashboard.weeklyPrivate: Based on private check-ins that only you can see.
recoveryDashboard.weeklyInsufficient: There is not enough data to show a meaningful pattern yet.
recoveryDashboard.weeklyNeedMore: Save {count} more check-ins to unlock your weekly review.
recoveryDashboard.weeklyRecorded: You recorded {count} check-ins in the last seven days.
recoveryDashboard.weeklyAccessibleSummary: Mood chart from your private check-ins during the last seven days.
recoveryDashboard.weeklyStable: The condition you recorded was relatively steady this week.
recoveryDashboard.weeklyChanged: The condition you recorded changed a few times this week.
recoveryDashboard.weeklyStrongerUrge: A strong urge appeared in {count} check-ins.
recoveryDashboard.protectionDescription: Make sure protection is ready when you need it.
recoveryDashboard.protectionReadyBody: Your device is connected and protection is active.
recoveryDashboard.protectionNeedsAttentionBody: Open settings to check the connection or turn protection on.
recoveryDashboard.protectionUnavailable: Device status is not available yet.
recoveryDashboard.partnerDescription: The partner dashboard only opens relationships, approvals, and permitted aggregates. Mood, intentions, journals, and browsing history remain private.
recoveryDashboard.partnerPrivacyBody: No URL, domain, mood, intentions, journals, and browsing history remain private.
recoveryDashboard.localDataCleared: Local recovery data has been cleared.
recoveryDashboard.quickJournalDesc: Write a short sentence about how you feel right now. It helps to clear your mind.
recoveryDashboard.streakDesc: A record of presence, not a target that must be perfect.
recoveryDashboard.glanceActiveDays: days with recovery activity in the last 7 days
recoveryDashboard.glanceProgressBody: {count} check-ins are available for your review.
recoveryDashboard.glanceLearnBody: Short modules without pressure to finish at once.
recoveryDashboard.glanceRecoveryBody: Manage intentions, practices, and reflections in one place.
recoveryDashboard.shortcutDescription: Open the information and settings you use most often.
recoveryDashboard.shortcutProgressBody: Review personal trends from the check-ins you save.
recoveryDashboard.learningError: Learning content could not be loaded. You can try again.
recoveryDashboard.learningEmpty: There are no modules available for your account yet.
recoveryDashboard.fabDescription: Claim EXP after the system verifies your account activity.
recoveryDashboard.dailyTasksDescription: The system checks your progress. Claim unlocks automatically when a requirement is met.
recoveryDashboard.claimLocked: Not yet verified by the system
recoveryDashboard.adjustDescription: Choose a replacement or skip it today. No EXP will be removed.
recoveryDashboard.adjustReasonNotAGoodFit: This task is not a good fit
recoveryDashboard.adjustReasonAccessibilityNeed: I need a more accessible option
recoveryDashboard.reflectionPrompt: Take 30 seconds to close today's task.
recoveryDashboard.reflectionDescription: This note is private and stored encrypted.
recoveryDashboard.reflectionNotePlaceholder: What would you like to remember from today?
recoveryDashboard.reflectionNextStepPlaceholder: For example: repeat a breathing exercise tomorrow
recoveryDashboard.reflectionError: The reflection could not be saved. Try again.
recoveryDashboard.levelUp: A new level is open. Keep going at your own pace.
recoveryDashboard.fabCheckInRequired: Complete today's check-in so recommendations use only the choices you provide.
recoveryDashboard.biteSizedLearningDesc: Pausing for 10 seconds before acting on an urge can significantly reduce impulsive behaviors.
recoveryDashboard.emergencyHelpDesc: You do not have to face a difficult moment alone. Choose the support that feels most comfortable.
recoveryDashboard.emergencyHelpPlanBody: Review your intention and personal steps so your next source of support is clearer.

recoveryHub.title: Build a recovery approach that fits you
recoveryHub.description: Manage your intention, practise skills, and choose support without sharing private notes with a partner.
recoveryHub.privateBody: Intentions and practice choices are stored locally first. Account sync can be enabled per category and never shares them with a partner.
recoveryHub.intentionDescription: An intention can be edited, paused, or archived. Changing direction is not failure.
recoveryHub.noIntention: There is no active intention yet.
recoveryHub.historyEmpty: History will appear after you create an intention or change its status.
recoveryHub.skillsDescription: Choose a short exercise before you need it.
recoveryHub.educationBody: Use psychoeducation modules to understand urges and ways to respond.
recoveryHub.supportBody: Contact someone you trust or open the help center if the situation feels hard to manage alone.
recoveryHub.deleteLocalBody: This removes intentions, check-ins, and weekly plans from this browser. It cannot be undone.
recoveryHub.deleteLocalConfirm: Yes, clear it from this browser
recoveryHub.journalDescription: Write down your thoughts securely. Entries are saved only when data protection is ready.
recoveryHub.journalInputPlaceholder: How did you manage your urges today?
recoveryHub.journalEmptyHint: Your first saved reflection will appear here.
recoveryHub.journalError: The reflection journal couldn't be loaded.
recoveryHub.journalSaveError: Your reflection couldn't be saved. Please try again.

weeklyReview.title: Weekly review
weeklyReview.description: See the patterns you recorded, then choose one adjustment for next week.
weeklyReview.insufficientBody: We need at least three check-ins in seven days so we do not draw conclusions from too little data.
weeklyReview.stableSummary: The mood you recorded was relatively steady this week.
weeklyReview.variableSummary: The mood you recorded changed a few times this week.
weeklyReview.higherUrgeSummary: A stronger urge appeared in {count} check-ins.
weeklyReview.helpfulDescription: Choose what felt most useful this week.
weeklyReview.helpfulUnknownHint: That is okay. You can try a different option next week.
weeklyReview.intentionEmpty: There is no active intention to review yet.
weeklyReview.recommendationReason: The suggestion uses check-ins you entered yourself, not your browsing history.
weeklyReview.planSaved: Next week's plan is saved in this browser.
weeklyReview.privacyFooter: Mood, urges, intentions, and reflections are not shared with your partner.

educationLibrary.title: Learn skills, not just restrictions
educationLibrary.description: Published modules help you understand urges and practise responses you can choose for yourself.
educationLibrary.privacyNote: Reading progress never contains browsing history.
educationLibrary.errorBody: Check your connection and try again. No sample content is shown as if it were real data.
educationLibrary.emptyTitle: No modules have been published yet
educationLibrary.emptyBody: Modules will appear after they are reviewed and published by a content manager.
educationLibrary.moduleUnavailableBody: The module may not be published or may be temporarily unavailable.
educationLibrary.progressUnavailable: Progress tracking is not available for this module yet.
educationLibrary.contentEmpty: Module content is not available yet.
educationLibrary.checkIncorrect: Not quite. Review the material and try again.
educationLibrary.externalTitle: This content comes from an external site
educationLibrary.externalBody: Open it only if you agree to connect to that provider.
educationLibrary.videoUnsupported: This browser cannot play the video.

progressV2.summaryBody: Choose 7, 30, or 90 days. Trends appear only after at least three check-ins.
progressV2.unavailable: Progress summary is not available yet
progressV2.exportBody: The export is created entirely in this browser and includes your account summary and local recovery data.
progressV2.exportWarningTitle: This file contains private recovery data
progressV2.exportWarningBody: Store it on a secure device and do not share it with a partner unless you choose to do so.
progressV2.pdfInstruction: Use the browser print dialog and choose Save as PDF.
progressV2.partnerBody: View broad support indicators without mood, journals, intentions, or browsing details.
progressV2.partnerPrivacyBody: Every metric follows the student's sharing choices. Revoked values appear as not shared.
progressV2.membersBody: Use this summary to offer support, never ranking or punishment.
progressV2.noMembers: There are no active members in your groups yet.

recoverySyncV2.title: Synced recovery plan
recoverySyncV2.body: Drafts stay in the browser. A note is only submitted after you save it, and sensitive content is encrypted before storage.

placeholders.roadmap: Write your current goal and one small next step...
placeholders.coping_plan: If an urge grows, a safe place and person I can contact are...
placeholders.weekly_review: What helped this week, and what would I like to change next week?
placeholders.practice_log: The practice you tried, its duration, and anything that felt different...
placeholders.saved_resource: Note the material title or why it may be useful...
placeholders.reminder: A short message you want to read when the reminder appears...

recoverySyncV2.draftHelp: The draft is not sent to the server and stays in this browser until you save the note.
recoverySyncV2.empty: No synced notes yet. Start with a roadmap or urge coping plan.
recoverySyncV2.partnerTitle: Support the process without opening private space
recoverySyncV2.partnerBody: A partner listens, responds calmly, and helps with practical next steps—without accessing a student's recovery notes.
recoverySyncV2.partnerPrivacyTitle: Student recovery records cannot be opened by a partner
recoverySyncV2.partnerPrivacyBody: Mood, check-in content, intentions, journals, roadmaps, and private practices are not available to partner accounts.
recoverySyncV2.supportDoBody: Ask what kind of help is wanted, respect the answer, offer one concrete step, and refer to professional support when there is a safety risk.
recoverySyncV2.supportAvoidBody: Do not demand browsing evidence, rank, shame, threaten, or use protection approval as punishment.

recoveryRoom.title: Your recovery room
recoveryRoom.description: Choose one object in the room. Every practice is a small step you can pause or repeat without punishment.
recoveryRoom.roomAlt: A calm dorm room with a window, rug, study desk, journal, and phone as interactive practice points.
recoveryRoom.collectionBody: Objects unlock from real activity, never luck or purchases.
recoveryRoom.collectionHint: Choose an object to place it in or remove it from the room.
recoveryRoom.collectionEmpty: Complete one practice to unlock your first object.
recoveryRoom.decorPlaced: Object placed in your recovery room.
recoveryRoom.decorRemoved: Object removed from your recovery room.
recoveryRoom.decorSaveError: The object placement could not be saved yet.
recoveryRoom.legacyTitle: You have an older goal note
recoveryRoom.legacyBody: We will not move it automatically. If it still matters, you can copy it once as a next step in the Reflection Journal.
recoveryRoom.legacyJournalText: I chose to carry one older goal into my Reflection Journal.
recoveryRoom.legacyImported: The older goal was copied as your journal focus.

urge.label: Urge surfing
urge.body: Notice an urge like a wave: it arrives, grows, and passes without needing an immediate response.

grounding.label: 5-4-3-2-1 grounding
grounding.body: Bring your attention back to the room around you through five senses.

focus.label: 10-minute focus
focus.body: Choose one small task and give yourself ten minutes to begin.

journal.label: Reflection Journal
journal.body: Write what happened, what you learned, and one small next step.

support.label: Contact support
support.body: Choose the human support that feels most comfortable right now.

recoveryRoom.urgeInstruction: Let your breath move naturally. Name sensations without judging or fighting them.
recoveryRoom.focusInstruction: Close what you do not need. You do not have to finish everything—just stay with this task.

see.title: See five things
see.body: Find five objects or colors you can see right now.

touch.title: Feel four things
touch.body: Notice four textures or points of contact on your body.

hear.title: Hear three sounds
hear.body: Find three sounds, including very quiet ones.

smell.title: Notice two scents
smell.body: Notice two scents nearby or two scents you remember.

taste.title: Notice one taste
taste.body: Notice one taste or slowly drink some water.

recoveryRoom.feedbackTitle: How does it feel after the practice?
recoveryRoom.practiceSaveError: The practice could not be saved. Try again when your connection is ready.
recoveryRoom.focusTaskPlaceholder: Example: open class notes and read one page
recoveryRoom.focusLocal: The task name stays in this browser and is not sent to the server.
recoveryRoom.journalPlaceholder: What did you notice or learn today?
recoveryRoom.focusNextStep: Make this the focus shown again later
recoveryRoom.journalSaveError: The reflection could not be saved.
recoveryRoom.journalEmpty: No reflections yet. Start with one sentence.
recoveryRoom.trustedPersonBody: Open your partner relationship and choose how to contact them.
recoveryRoom.supportTeamBody: Create a support ticket or view urgent help.

partnerSimulator.title: Practice responding calmly
partnerSimulator.description: Practice supportive responses through content-reviewed scenarios—without opening a student's private space.
partnerSimulator.emptyTitle: No simulator scenario has been published
partnerSimulator.emptyBody: The simulator will appear after a content admin publishes a partner-response module.
partnerSimulator.fictional: This conversation is a learning scenario, not a real student message.
partnerSimulator.answerError: The response could not be checked.
partnerSimulator.coachingBody: A helpful response acknowledges feelings, asks what support is wanted, then offers one small step.
partnerSimulator.privacyBody: Partners cannot see a student's journal, mood, recovery room, focus task, or practice sessions.

progressExperience.title: The path you are building
progressExperience.description: See the days when you showed up for yourself. This calendar records participation, not perfection.
progressExperience.unavailable: Your progress path could not be loaded
progressExperience.calendarBody: Choose a day to see the types of activity you completed.
progressExperience.insufficientTitle: Not enough data to read a trend
progressExperience.insufficientBody: You have {count} check-ins. At least three are needed so the summary does not guess.
progressExperience.collectionBody: Each object represents a day when you chose to show up. Quiet days are not failures.
progressExperience.reviewBody: Connect what helped, what was difficult, and one adjustment for the next week.
progressExperience.quietDay: No saved activity on this day. A day without a record is not a failure.
progressExperience.reviewLoadError: This week's review could not be loaded
progressExperience.reviewLoadErrorBody: Reload it before editing so an existing saved review is not overwritten.
progressExperience.reviewSelectionRequired: Choose at least one thing that helped or felt difficult.
progressExperience.adjustmentPlaceholder: What would you realistically like to change?
progressExperience.nextMissionRequired: Enter one small step for the next week.
progressExperience.skillRequired: Enter the skill or resource you want to use.
progressExperience.saveAsFocus: Also save this adjustment as a focus in the Reflection Journal
progressExperience.reviewJournalText: This week's review helped me choose one next adjustment.
progressExperience.reviewError: The weekly review could not be saved.
progressExperience.reviewFocusError: The review was saved, but the journal focus could not be created.
progressExperience.exportBody: The export is created in the browser and may contain private recovery data.
progressExperience.pdfReady: The print dialog is complete. Your PDF is available if you chose Save as PDF.
progressExperience.exportError: The export could not be created. Try again from this browser.
progressExperience.pdfInstruction: Use the browser print dialog and choose Save as PDF.
progressExperience.pdfNoActivity: No activity has been saved in this range yet.
progressExperience.partnerBody: See your own learning and only the member summaries they consented to share.
progressExperience.learningPathBody: Complete partner scenarios to practise being present, listening, and offering a safe step.
progressExperience.sharedBody: Only broad categories selected by members. No private detail or timeline.
progressExperience.privacyBoundaryBody: A student's journal, mood, recovery room, focus task, practice sessions, URLs, and daily patterns never appear on a partner page.
